hero.tagline: The Mark of Your True Self

concept.body: A tattoo is more than ink on skin — it is a record of memory, belief, and your true identity. At True Mark, we create art that carries meaning, not just beauty.

cards.desc: T represents truth and stability. Every piece we create is driven by genuine intention and unwavering commitment to the craft.
M represents a meaningful mark. Every design is crafted to reflect the identity and story of the person wearing it.
Together, they form "The Mark of Your True Self" — a tattoo that expresses who you truly are.

services.sub: Every style, every scale, every vision — we bring it to life on your skin.

items.desc: Bespoke designs crafted exclusively for you — conveying your personal story. No two are alike in the world.
Delicate, precise linework for those who appreciate subtlety and refinement in their art.
Bold, powerful black ink — from geometric to tribal to illustrative, each piece is distinctly yours.
Lifelike portraits with extraordinary detail — people, animals, or nature rendered on skin.
Transform old tattoos into fresh, beautiful works using refined technique and years of experience.
Keep your tattoo looking its best with our professional touch-up service and aftercare guidance.

steps.desc: We talk through your vision, the meaning behind it, and the style that best represents you.
A custom design is crafted specifically for you, refined through revisions until it's perfect.
We tattoo in a clean, safe environment using medical-grade equipment and sterile materials.
We guide you through proper aftercare so your tattoo heals beautifully and lasts.

quote.text: "A great tattoo does not merely decorate the body — it tells stories that words cannot."
quote.author: — True Mark Tattoo Studio

contact.body: Ready to turn your vision into a meaningful mark. Reach out to book a session or get a free consultation.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your idea or what you have in mind...
form.success: Thank you! We will get back to you shortly.

shop.sub: Products curated to care for your tattoo and express your True Mark.

features.desc: Every product is tested by tattoo artists and skincare specialists.
Nationwide delivery with usage guidance from True Mark.
Not satisfied? Full refund within 7 days, no questions asked.

products.desc: A natural-formula balm that deeply moisturizes and keeps your tattoo vivid for longer.
Gentle on fresh skin — reduces inflammation and maintains pH balance for the first 1–2 weeks.
Shields your tattoo from UV rays, preventing fading. Safe for daily use once healed.
100% premium cotton, oversized cut, screen-printed TM Monogram in silver tone.
Balm + Foam + Sunscreen bundled in a True Mark gift box — better value than buying separately.
Give the gift of a tattoo experience. Choose any value from 500 – 5,000 THB.

shop.ctaSub: Free consultation, no commitment. Contact us anytime.
shop.loadError: We could not load the products right now.

cart.label: Your Selection
cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyBody: Explore our collection and add the products you need.
cart.priceNotice: Prices and availability will be verified by the server before payment.

checkout.label: Secure Checkout
checkout.title: Complete Your Order
checkout.cardBody: Pay securely on the payment provider's hosted checkout page.
checkout.secureBody: True Mark never receives or stores your card number, expiry date or security code.
checkout.finalNotice: The backend will verify prices, stock and the final total before creating the payment session.
checkout.error: Unable to open secure payment. Please try again.
checkout.empty: Add products to your cart before checkout.

success.label: Payment Submitted
success.title: Thank You For Your Order
success.body: Your payment was submitted. The final order status must be confirmed by the backend payment webhook.

cancel.label: Payment Cancelled
cancel.title: Your Cart Is Still Waiting
cancel.body: No payment was completed. You can return to checkout and try again.

estimate.label: Tattoo Estimate
estimate.title: Begin With Your Idea
estimate.intro: Share your reference and a few details. We will prepare an indicative range before an artist reviews your request.
estimate.referenceBody: Add one clear image that best represents your direction.
estimate.uploadHint: JPG, PNG or WEBP, up to 8 MB
estimate.fileTypeError: Please select a JPG, PNG or WEBP image.
estimate.fileSizeError: The image must be smaller than 8 MB.
estimate.privacy: Your reference is only used for this estimate and is not uploaded until you submit.
estimate.placementBody: These details help us understand the scale and complexity.
estimate.detailsBody: Tell us how you want the final piece to feel.
estimate.coverUp: This project is a cover-up or rework of an existing tattoo.
estimate.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the subject, meaning, important elements and anything the artist should know.
estimate.reviewBody: Check the details and leave a contact method for the artist review.
estimate.disclaimer: This is a preliminary range based on the information provided. The final price is confirmed by the artist after consultation.
estimate.consent: I agree that True Mark may use these details and the reference image to review this estimate request.
estimate.successTitle: Your Idea Is Ready For Review
estimate.successBody: The frontend flow is complete. Once connected to the backend, this request will be securely sent to the studio for artist review.

aiEstimate.label: AI Tattoo Analysis
aiEstimate.title: Analyze Your Tattoo Idea
aiEstimate.intro: Upload a reference image and Gemini Vision will help identify style, complexity and key attributes before our pricing engine prepares an indicative range.
aiEstimate.uploadBody: Use a clear image that shows the complete design.
aiEstimate.uploadHint: JPG, PNG or WEBP, up to 8 MB
aiEstimate.previewAlt: Tattoo image selected for AI analysis
aiEstimate.detailsBody: Add context the image alone cannot provide.
aiEstimate.notesPlaceholder: Describe color preferences, cover-up needs or important details.
aiEstimate.consent: I agree that this image may be securely sent to the AI analysis service for this estimate only.
aiEstimate.security: Gemini is called by the backend. The Gemini API key is never exposed to the browser.
aiEstimate.fileTypeError: Please select a JPG, PNG or WEBP image.
aiEstimate.fileSizeError: The image must be smaller than 8 MB.
aiEstimate.analysisError: AI analysis could not be completed. Please try again or request an artist review.
aiEstimate.priceDisclaimer: Gemini analyzes visual attributes only. The pricing engine calculates this range, and the final price must be confirmed by an artist.

notFound.title: This Page Has No Mark
notFound.body: The page you are looking for may have moved or does not exist.

footer.tagline: The Mark of Your True Self
